title: Add more column options to Kanban card in the new Kanban view (particularly Timeline and/or Date)
excerpt:
It would be great to have more options of columns visible in the Kanban card view! Particularly timeline and date columns. 
Screenshot 2024-07-19 at 9.43.40 AM|291x500

posts.author: nicolejones (Nicole Jones)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great to have more options of columns visible in the Kanban card view! Particularly timeline and date columns.
